tips_en: Read DOPD first—it identifies a fundamental 'privilege illusion' problem in on-policy distillation and presents an elegant dual-distillation solution with strong empirical gains (7.5 points over vanilla OPD, recovering 89.8% of the teacher-student gap), making it broadly relevant for anyone working on LLM/VLM compression. BlockPilot is a natural follow-up if you're focused on inference efficiency, as it offers a lightweight, practical method (5.92 acceptance length, 4.20× speedup) for diffusion-based speculative decoding. All three papers share a theme of pushing efficiency boundaries—Orca via a unified world latent, BlockPilot via adaptive decoding, and DOPD via smarter distillation—making them a coherent trio for a day of reading on efficient and generalizable model design.
tips_zh: 建议先读 DOPD——它揭示了在线策略蒸馏中一个根本性的"特权幻觉"问题，并提出了优雅的双蒸馏解决方案，实证效果显著（比标准 OPD 平均提升 7.5 分，恢复了 89.8% 的师生差距），对从事 LLM/VLM 压缩的研究者具有广泛参考价值。若你关注推理效率，BlockPilot 是顺理成章的第二选择，它为扩散式投机解码提供了一种轻量实用的方法（接受长度 5.92、4.20× 加速比）。三篇论文共同围绕"效率边界拓展"这一主题：Orca 通过统一世界潜空间，BlockPilot 通过自适应解码，DOPD 通过更智能的蒸馏，是一天高效阅读的连贯组合。
